title: Longer Contiguous Segments of Ones than Zeros
titleCn: 哪种连续子字符串更长

testcases.input: s = "1101" Output: true Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 2: "1101" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 1: "1101" The segment of 1s is longer, so return true.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 2: "1101" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 1: "1101" The segment of 1s is longer, so return true.

testcases.input: s = "111000" Output: false Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 3: "111000" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 3: "111000" The segment of 1s is not longer, so return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 3: "111000" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 3: "111000" The segment of 1s is not longer, so return false.

testcases.input: s = "110100010" Output: false Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 2: "110100010" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 3: "110100010" The segment of 1s is not longer, so return false.
testcases.expectedOutput: false Explanation: The longest contiguous segment of 1s has length 2: "110100010" The longest contiguous segment of 0s has length 3: "110100010" The segment of 1s is not longer, so return false.
